---
title: "Canada's Parks, Mapped"
description: "The boundaries of every national, provincial and territorial park in Canada"
---

This map shows the **boundaries** of Canada's national, provincial, and territorial parks — more than 700 of them — coloured by which level of government manages them. **Zoom and pan to explore**, and hover any park for its name. The southern provinces hold hundreds of smaller parks; the largest are in the North and the mountain West. (Only terrestrial *parks* are shown: the far larger marine conservation areas, and smaller municipal, regional, and conservation designations, are left out. Boundaries are for illustration, not legal definition.)

This is a detailed, heavier map kept on its own page so the [Protected & Conserved Areas](protected.qmd) overview stays light.

```{python}
#| echo: false
import os, json
import pandas as pd
from pipeline.charts import choropleth_categorical

geo_path = "data/geo/parks_detailed.geojson"
if os.path.exists(geo_path):
    gj = json.load(open(geo_path))
    df = pd.DataFrame([{"id": f["id"], **f["properties"]} for f in gj["features"]])
    JUR_COLORS = {"Federal": "#2e7d32", "Provincial": "#4477aa", "Territorial": "#cc8844"}
    fig = choropleth_categorical(gj, df, "id", "jurisdiction", name_col="name",
        color_map=JUR_COLORS, ordered=["Federal", "Provincial", "Territorial"],
        legend_title="Managed by", center={"lat": 59, "lon": -96}, zoom=2.3, height=680,
        source_note="Source: Environment and Climate Change Canada, Canadian Protected and Conserved Areas Database (CPCAD); terrestrial national, provincial & territorial parks. Boundaries are illustrative, not legal.")
    fig.show(config={"displaylogo": False, "scrollZoom": True,
                     "modeBarButtonsToRemove": ["lasso2d", "select2d"]})
else:
    print("Detailed parks data not yet available — run `python -m pipeline.build_geography`.")
```

## Download data

- [National, provincial & territorial park boundaries (GeoJSON)](../data/geo/parks_detailed.geojson) — ECCC, Canadian Protected and Conserved Areas Database
